name: Digerati Technologies, Inc.
business: The company provides cloud-based hosted services including cloud telephony applications such as hosted IP/PBX services, SIP trunking, call center applications, and unified communications, as well as enterprise-class data and connectivity solutions including cloud WAN, SD-WAN, fiber, and Ethernet over copper. The company also offers remote network monitoring, data backup, and disaster recovery services. Revenue is primarily from subscription services recognized over time as services are rendered.

exposures.sentence: The Company recognizes cloud-based hosted services revenue, mainly from subscription services for its cloud telephony applications that includes hosted IP/PBX services, SIP trunking, call center applications, auto attendant, voice and web conferencing, call recording, messaging, voicemail to email conversion, integrated mobility applications that are device and location agnostic, and other customized applications.
